title: hopea micrantha
intro: Hopea micrantha, also known as the small-leafed tree or the Borneo ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The medicinal properties of Hopea micrantha include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. Hopea micrantha is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or extract, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments.
